items.name: Firebird Ornate Cape
items.description: Crafted from the feathers of a Phoenix that rose from the ashes, this cape is said to imbue its wearer with the fiery essence of the legendary bird. It is said that those who wear this cape are rumored to be blessed with the power to rise from the ashes of their own troubles and blaze a trail of glory wherever they go.
